steps.title: Account for the nine-pound boxes
steps.content:
There are $15$ boxes that each weigh $9$ pounds, so their total weight is
$$15(9)=135$$

steps.title: Find the remaining weight
steps.content:
Subtract that from the shipment's total weight:
$$219-135=84$$

steps.title: Divide by four pounds
steps.content:
Each remaining box weighs $4$ pounds, so
$$\frac{84}{4}=21$$
The answer is D.
